new_findings_this_run.detail: Live trending regime WR = 51.9% (27/52) vs advertised 55% backtest figure. 3.1-point live underperformance. Overall trending category dragged down by BTC LONG trending (18% WR, n=17) while ETH trending (71%) and BTC SHORT trending (80%) remain strong. corrections.original_concern: Trailing 4-loss streak might persist into restart triggering circuit breaker at 5th loss.
corrections.resolution: RESOLVED — risk.py:64: self.consecutive_losses = 0 at __init__. Every restart creates fresh instance with count=0. No manual reset needed.
corrections.remaining_insight: Pre-shutdown WR degradation (40%→30%) is still a real signal. First 10 post-restart trades are the canary — if WR < 40% persists, investigate regime/setup quality.
